All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

A

abraxisFilePathList - Static variable in class Cataphract.Core.Loader
A list of kernel file paths used by Abraxis subsystem to verify kernel integrity
abraxisLogic() - Method in class Cataphract.Core.Loader
Logic of the Abraxis sub-system to check if kernel programs are verified and can be booted without issues.

B

Build - Class in Cataphract.API
A class to display the build information and clear the screen.
Build() - Constructor for class Cataphract.API.Build
 

C

Cataphract.API - package Cataphract.API
The API package contains all essential programs that helps in the functioning of Cataphract correctly.
Cataphract.API.Minotaur - package Cataphract.API.Minotaur
The Minotaur package contains tools relating to cryptography for checking hashes for files and literals.
Cataphract.Core - package Cataphract.Core
The Core package contains the essential kernel files for the kernel to boot and function correctly.
checkFileHashes() - Method in class Cataphract.Core.Loader
Logic to check the file hashes against the M1 manifest hashes.
checkFileSizes() - Method in class Cataphract.Core.Loader
Logic to check the file sizes against the Manifest M2 sizes
clearScreen() - Static method in class Cataphract.API.Build
 
confirmReturnToContinue() - Static method in class Cataphract.API.IOStreams
Provide a method that will ask the user to press the RETURN key.
console - Variable in class Cataphract.Core.Loader
Instantiate Console to get user inputs
convertByteArrayToHexString(byte[]) - Method in class Cataphract.API.Minotaur.Cryptography
Convert the byte array to a Hex String
convertFileSeparator(String) - Method in class Cataphract.Core.Loader
Logic to convert from an OS dependent file separator format of file paths to Nion File Separator format.
convertToNionSeparator(String) - Method in class Cataphract.Core.Loader
Logic to convert from an OS dependent file separator format of file paths to Nion File Separator format.
Cryptography - Class in Cataphract.API.Minotaur
A class implementing cryptographic hashing methods for files and literals
Cryptography() - Constructor for class Cataphract.API.Minotaur.Cryptography
Sole constructor.

D

displayMessages(String) - Static method in class Main
A method that displays messages with the specified header and footer.

F

FATAL_ERROR_EXIT - Static variable in class Main
A critical information notifying the user that the kernel exited fatally.
FATAL_ERROR_RESTART - Static variable in class Main
A critical information notifying the user that the kernel is restarting after exiting fatally.
fileIgnoreList(String) - Method in class Cataphract.Core.Loader
Logic to ignore certain files and directories who's value may or may not change over time.
fileToMD5(String) - Method in class Cataphract.API.Minotaur.Cryptography
Hashing API which will return the MD5 hash value of a given file
fileToSHA_256(String) - Method in class Cataphract.API.Minotaur.Cryptography
Hashing API which will return the SHA3-256 hash value of a given file
fileToSHA3_256(String) - Method in class Cataphract.API.Minotaur.Cryptography
Hashing API which will return the SHA3-256 hash value of a given file

G

guestShell() - Method in class Cataphract.Core.Loader
Logic to provide the user with a guest shell: a shell with limited functionality to be used before login

H

hashFile(File, String) - Method in class Cataphract.API.Minotaur.Cryptography
The logic to hash a file.
hashString(String, String) - Method in class Cataphract.API.Minotaur.Cryptography
Logic to hash a string

I

INVALID_SYNTAX - Static variable in class Main
An error notifying the user that the launcher syntax is invalid
IOStreams - Class in Cataphract.API
A class implementing console output with prefixes, colors, and a "Press Enter To Continue" functionality
IOStreams() - Constructor for class Cataphract.API.IOStreams
Sole constructor.

K

KERNEL_FOUND - Static variable in class Main
Message informing the user that the kernel probe was successful.
KERNEL_NOT_FOUND - Static variable in class Main
An error notifying the user that the kernel probe was unsuccessful.

L

launcherHelp - Static variable in class Main
A quick help for the launcher, if the user does not know how to boot a Kernel.
Loader - Class in Cataphract.Core
Entry point to the kernel loader.
Loader() - Constructor for class Cataphract.Core.Loader
Sole constructor.
loaderLogic() - Method in class Cataphract.Core.Loader
Logic that will load the kernel after checking the kernel integrity

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class Cataphract.Core.Loader
The entry point to the loader.
main(String[]) - Static method in class Main
Entry point of the Launcher program.
Main - Class in Unnamed Package
A program to launch kernels that follow the Nion Directory Specification and Nion Kernel Specification
Main() - Constructor for class Main
Sole constructor.
manifestFilesCheck() - Method in class Cataphract.Core.Loader
Logic to check if the Manifest files exists in the manifest directory.
messageFooter - Static variable in class Main
A footer used for messages, displayed right after the message.
messageHeader - Static variable in class Main
A header used for messages, displayed right before the message.

P

populateKernelFiles(File) - Method in class Cataphract.Core.Loader
Logic to populate the Kernel files into a list
printAttention(String) - Static method in class Cataphract.API.IOStreams
Prints the text specified, prefixed with an Attention tag
printError(String) - Static method in class Cataphract.API.IOStreams
Prints the text specified, prefixed with an Error tag
printInfo(String) - Static method in class Cataphract.API.IOStreams
Prints the text specified, prefixed with an Information tag
println(int, int, String) - Static method in class Cataphract.API.IOStreams
Text that can have a formatted background and foreground color to make a piece of text distinct from the rest.
println(String) - Static method in class Cataphract.API.IOStreams
Prints the text specified.
printWarning(String) - Static method in class Cataphract.API.IOStreams
Prints the text specified, prefixed with a Warning tag

R

RESTART_UPDATE - Static variable in class Main
An information that the kernel is restarting after an update installation.

S

setupStatusCheck() - Method in class Cataphract.Core.Loader
Logic to check if Cataphract has been setup on the system.
startKernelLogic(String[]) - Static method in class Main
A method that has the logic to start or probe a kernel.
stringToMD5(String) - Method in class Cataphract.API.Minotaur.Cryptography
Hashing API which will convert a string to an MD5 hash
stringToSHA_256(String) - Method in class Cataphract.API.Minotaur.Cryptography
Hashing API which will convert a string to an SHA3-256 hash
stringToSHA3_256(String) - Method in class Cataphract.API.Minotaur.Cryptography
Hashing API which will convert a string to an SHA3-256 hash

U

UNDEFINED_BOOTMODE - Static variable in class Main
An error notifying the user that the provided boot mode is not found
UNDEFINED_EXIT_CODE - Static variable in class Main
A Warning displayed to the user that the kernel exited with an undefined exit code.

V

viewBuildInfo() - Static method in class Cataphract.API.Build
 

_

_Branding - Static variable in class Cataphract.API.Build
 
_BuildInfo - Static variable in class Cataphract.API.Build
 
_textColorBackground - Static variable in class Cataphract.API.IOStreams
Array that holds the text background values
_textColorForeground - Static variable in class Cataphract.API.IOStreams
Array that holds the text foreground values
